innateAbility.name: Special Delivery
innateAbility.description: Marci whistles and instantly teleports her Courier to her.

abilities.name: Dispose
abilities.description: Grabs the unit-targeted ally or enemy unit and throws it effortlessly behind her, damaging and slowing the unit if it's an enemy.Additionally damages and applies a movement speed slow to all enemy units within the landing radius.

abilities.name: Rebound
abilities.description: Marci bounds to the targeted unit, choosing a direction and distance she will spring away from it. Grants the targeted ally a short duration movement speed bonus.Upon reaching the unit, Marci leaps to her landing point, damaging and stunning enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.description: Passively grants Marci lifesteal and bonus attack damage.

abilities.name: Unleash
abilities.description: Taps a hidden power, increasing movement speed while gaining flurry charges that allow Marci to deliver a rapid sequence of strikes.Unlocks max attack speed upon cast.
